The timeline

Recent

Chief Technology Officer

$B+ P&L

Microsoft — Global Partner Solutions

Shaped technical vision and partner-led growth at global scale. Led multi-billion-dollar platforms and global partner ecosystems. Drove platform transformation and new-business acceleration across every level of enterprise scale.

Prior

Chief of Staff to the CEO

Fortune 50

Intel Corporation

Fortune 50 enterprise operating experience. Saw firsthand how technology strategy and business strategy must converge at the highest levels.

Early

Foundation

U.S. Department of Defense

Foundation in systems at their most fundamental level. Critical government systems experience that shaped every leadership role since.
